diagrams.title: Stack Layout with Buffer Overflow
diagrams.description: Shows how a stack-based buffer overflow overwrites return address
diagrams.purpose: Understanding stack frame structure and overflow mechanics

diagrams.title: ASLR Memory Randomization
diagrams.description: Shows randomized memory layout across process restarts
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how ASLR makes exploit development unpredictable

diagrams.title: Defense Layers (Defense in Depth)
diagrams.description: Multiple security layers protecting against overflow attacks
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that no single defense is sufficient
